title: chrysanthemum achilleifolium
intro: Chrysanthemum achilleifolium, also known as golden yarrow or Mexican feather grass, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum achilleifolium include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds, as well as supporting the immune system. Chrysanthemum achilleifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in topical applications for wound care and skin issues.
